topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into 3D Graphics. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for AR/VR Developer roles.
whyItMatters: 3D Graphics is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing 3D Graphics in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given 3D Graphics snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of 3D Graphics?
How does 3D Graphics handle memory management?
